Configuration settings, main entry point, and memory pool definitions for JerryScript on Quark BSP.


## Files
- **[defconfig](defconfig.md)**: Configuration settings for the Quark BSP target in the JerryScript project on the Zephyr OS.
- **[main.c](main.c.md)**: Main entry point for initializing and running a JerryScript environment on a Quark-based system.
- **[memory_pool_list.def](memory_pool_list.def.md)**: Defines memory pools for block allocation with specific sizes, counts, and alignment.
